typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	varEndYear as integer (),
	varOTables as string (),
	varStartYear as integer (),
	var_batches as string (),
	var_batch_nbr as integer (),
	var_log_path as string (),
	var_fzg_fnln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_fnln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_fn_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_ln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	Var_log_path as string ()
}

source(output(
		patient_alternate_set_id as integer,
		row_id as string,
		stage_id as integer,
		original_match_code as string,
		new_match_code as string,

		phn as string,
		phn_clean as string,
		name_first as string,
		name_first_middle as string,
		first_name_score as integer,
		name_last as string,
		last_name_score as integer,
		birth_date as date,
		gender as string,
		aka_name as string,
		street_addr1 as string,
		street_addr2 as string,
		city as string,
		province as string,
		postal_code as string,
		phone_number as string,
		data_source as string,
		dupe_count as short,
		julian_month as short,
		patient_nbr as integer,
		master_row_id as string,
		master_phn as string,
		master_name_first_middle as string,
		master_name_last as string,
		master_birth_date as date,
		master_gender as string,
		master_street_addr1 as string,
		master_street_addr2 as string,
		master_city as string,
		master_province as string,
		master_postal_code as string,
		master_phone_number as string,
		master_patient_status as string,
		master_data_source as string,
		mark as short,
		conflict_flg as string,
		dss_create_dt_tm as timestamp
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'DECLARE @max_patient_alternate_set_id  as int SELECT @max_patient_alternate_set_id= max(patient_alternate_set_id) from  [ecms].[tmp_patient_alternate_set] A  SELECT  ROW_NUMBER () OVER (ORDER BY pp.original_row_id,pas.original_match_code)+@max_patient_alternate_set_id as patient_alternate_set_id ,  pp.original_row_id as row_id,  pas.stage_id+1000000 as stage_id,  pas.original_match_code,  pas.new_match_code,  pas.new_match_confidence_factor,  pas.row_score,  pp.hosp_patient_nbr,  pp.phn,  pp.phn_clean,  pp.name_first,  pp.name_first_middle,  pas.first_name_score,  pp.name_last,  pas.last_name_score,  pp.birth_date,  pp.gender,  pp.aka_name,  pp.street_addr1,  pp.street_addr2,  pp.city,  pp.province,  pp.postal_code,  pp.phone_number,  pp.data_source,  pas.dupe_count,  Isnull (pp.julian_month, pas.julian_month) as julian_month,  Isnull(pp.patient_nbr, pas.patient_nbr) as patient_nbr,  pas.master_row_id,  pas.master_phn,  pas.master_name_first_middle,  pas.master_name_last,  pas.master_birth_date,  pas.master_gender,  pas.master_street_addr1,  pas.master_street_addr2,  pas.master_city,  pas.master_province,  pas.master_postal_code,  pas.master_phone_number,  pas.master_patient_status,  pas.master_data_source,  pas.mark,  pas.conflict_flg,  CAST(SYSDATETIME() as datetime2(0)) AS dss_create_dt_tm FROM  [ecms].[tmp_patient_alternate_set] AS pas INNER JOIN [ecms].[patient_prematched] AS pp         ON pas.row_id = pp.row_id',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> srcprematchaltset	source(output(
		patient_master_id as integer,
		row_id as string,
		stage_id as integer,
		row_score as integer,
		hosp_patient_nbr as string,
		phn as string,
		phn_clean as string,
		name_first as string,
		name_first_middle as string,
		first_name_score as integer,
		name_last as string,
		last_name_score as integer,
		birth_date as date,
		gender as string,
		aka_name as string,
		street_addr1 as string,
		street_addr2 as string,
		city as string,
		province as string,
		postal_code as string,
		phone_number as string,

	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'DECLARE @max_patient_master_id  as int SELECT @max_patient_master_id= max(patient_master_id) from  [ecms].[tmp_patient_master]  SELECT  ROW_NUMBER () OVER (ORDER BY pp.original_row_id) +@max_patient_master_id as patient_master_id,  pp.original_row_id as row_id,  tpm.stage_id+1000000 as stage_id,  tpm.row_score,  pp.hosp_patient_nbr,  pp.phn,  pp.phn_clean,  pp.name_first,  pp.name_first_middle,  tpm.first_name_score,  pp.name_last,  tpm.last_name_score,  pp.birth_date,  pp.gender,  pp.aka_name,  pp.street_addr1,  pp.street_addr2,  pp.city,  pp.province,  pp.postal_code,  pp.phone_number,  pp.patient_status,  pp.data_source,  tpm.dupe_count,  Isnull(pp.julian_month, tpm.julian_month) as julian_month,  Isnull(pp.patient_nbr, tpm.patient_nbr) as patient_nbr,  tpm.master_row_id,  tpm.master_phn,  tpm.master_name_first_middle,  tpm.master_name_last,  tpm.master_birth_date,  tpm.master_gender,  tpm.master_street_addr1,  tpm.master_street_addr2,  tpm.master_city,  tpm.master_province,  tpm.master_postal_code,  tpm.master_phone_number,  tpm.master_patient_status,  tpm.master_data_source,  tpm.mark,  tpm.match_code,  tpm.match_confidence_factor,  tpm.conflict_flg,  CAST(SYSDATETIME () as datetime2(0)) AS dss_create_dt_tm FROM  [ecms].[tmp_patient_master] AS tpm INNER JOIN [ecms].[patient_prematched] AS pp         ON tpm.row_id = pp.row_id',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> srcprematchmainset	source(output(

tmpalternateset,srcprematchaltset union(byName: true) ~> UAPreMatchedAltset
tmppatientmaster,srcprematchmainset union(byName: true) ~> UAPreMatchedMain
UAPreMatchedAltset sink(input(
		last_name_score as integer,
		master_data_source as string,
		gender as string,
		city as string,

	keys:[],
